case_title: ALEC HENRY FROMBERG VS. WELLS FARGO BANK NA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (WITH SUPPORTING DECLARATION) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FROMBERG, ALEC HENRY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-26-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-26-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ALEC HENRY FROMBERG IS PRESENT VIA COURTCALL APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK NA IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARIA RODARTE, PARALEGAL. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF FEB-03-2020
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK NA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-26-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY FROMBERG, ALEC HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK NA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FROMBERG, ALEC HENRY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FROMBERG, ALEC HENRY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK NA PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE ANY DISCRIMINATION BECAUSE OF DISABILITY. ORDER GRANTING REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE
